steps.title: Recognize the contrast structure
steps.content: The first clause says the beach sand is a different shade. What follows explains that most sand gets quartz and feldspar colors, while iron oxide gives this beach a red tint. A colon can introduce that explanation.

steps.title: Reject comma and period errors
steps.content: A creates a comma splice before a clause that continues the sentence, B wrongly isolates though with commas, and D cuts though off with a period. The colon starts the explanatory contrast cleanly. The answer is C.
